description: 清理 zhushou 仓库结构、补齐文档体系、统一检查入口，并固化后续代码治理规则。

userStories.title: 盘点根目录并记录资产处理结论
userStories.description: 作为项目维护者，我希望先完成根目录资产盘点和处理结论记录，以便后续清理工作有明确边界。
acceptanceCriteria: Create a root-structure inventory document that explains the purpose of every top-level directory and key loose file in the repository
Record an explicit keep, move, delete, or ignore decision for __MACOSX, .agents, .cursor, scripts/ralph, and test-bubble.ps1
Document whether cloudpet-mcp is treated as an independent subproject or a subsystem of the main desktop app
git diff shows no accidental deletion of source files, build configuration, or database-related files
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 建立项目状态总控文档
userStories.description: 作为项目维护者，我希望有一个统一的项目状态入口，以便不用翻聊天记录也能理解当前项目状态。
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/PROJECT_STATUS.md
The document includes current goals, in-progress work, recently completed work, the next smallest action, and current risks or blockers
The content is based on the current repository state instead of generic placeholder text
A new contributor can understand the current project phase and next action by reading only this document
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 创建功能需求卡目录和模板入口
userStories.description: 作为开发者，我希望先建立功能需求卡目录和统一模板入口，以便后续补齐功能文档时结构一致。
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/specs as the canonical directory for feature specification cards
Add a template or index document that defines the required sections for each feature card: goals, user path, inputs, outputs, business rules, edge cases, current status, and acceptance checklist
The specs directory is linked from an existing navigation document or index
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 补齐主窗口与基础交互能力需求卡
userStories.description: 作为开发者，我希望先补齐主窗口相关能力的需求卡，以便最核心桌面交互具备明确边界。
acceptanceCriteria: Create spec cards for the main cloud window, the speech bubble window, and settings under docs/specs
Each card includes goals, user path, inputs, outputs, business rules, edge cases, current status, and an acceptance checklist
Each card describes expected behavior rather than implementation details
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 补齐任务与调度能力需求卡
userStories.description: 作为开发者，我希望补齐 Todo、Scheduler 和 Reminder 的需求卡，以便任务相关能力具备清晰边界。
acceptanceCriteria: Create spec cards for Todo, Scheduler, and Reminder under docs/specs
Each card includes goals, user path, inputs, outputs, business rules, edge cases, current status, and an acceptance checklist
The Todo, Scheduler, and Reminder cards make their data and trigger boundaries explicit
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 补齐专注与 AI 能力需求卡
userStories.description: 作为开发者，我希望补齐 Focus、AI 对话和 Memory 的需求卡，以便专注和 AI 相关能力具备明确边界。
acceptanceCriteria: Create spec cards for Focus, AI chat, and Memory under docs/specs
Each card includes goals, user path, inputs, outputs, business rules, edge cases, current status, and an acceptance checklist
The AI chat and Memory cards distinguish user-facing behavior from implementation details
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 建立功能状态矩阵
userStories.description: 作为项目维护者，我希望有一份统一的功能状态矩阵，以便快速查看每项能力的当前状态和优先级。
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/specs/FEATURE_MATRIX.md
The matrix includes feature name, status, priority, linked documentation, and notes
Status values use one consistent set such as idea, planned, in-progress, shipped, and paused
Every existing spec card created in earlier stories is referenced from the matrix
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 建立项目路线图文档
userStories.description: 作为项目维护者，我希望有一份路线图文档，以便把当前阶段重点、明确暂不做事项和下一阶段候选工作写清楚。
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/specs/ROADMAP.md
The roadmap includes current phase priorities, explicit non-goals for the current phase, and next-phase candidate work
The roadmap language matches the statuses and priorities used in FEATURE_MATRIX.md
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 建立架构分层说明文档
userStories.description: 作为开发者，我希望有一份明确的架构分层说明，以便知道新代码应放在哪一层以及各层负责什么。
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/architecture/ARCHITECTURE.md
The document defines the responsibilities and boundaries of the UI layer, page coordination layer, service layer, Tauri/Rust layer, and cloudpet-mcp
The document explicitly marks src/App.tsx as a current governance hotspot rather than a default place for new business logic
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 建立事件文档
userStories.description: 作为开发者，我希望有一份事件文档，以便快速查到当前关键事件的发送方、接收方和用途。
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/architecture/EVENTS.md
Document the current key events with event name, sender, receiver, and purpose
The documented event names match the names already used in the codebase and existing project docs
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 建立关键数据流文档
userStories.description: 作为开发者，我希望有一份数据流文档，以便快速理解 Todo、Reminder、Scheduler、Chat 和 Memory 的关键链路。
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/architecture/DATA_FLOW.md
The document covers the runtime flow for Todo, Reminder, Scheduler, Chat, and Memory
For each flow, the document identifies the main inputs, processing layer, persistence or side effects, and observable outputs
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 建立技术债文档
userStories.description: 作为项目维护者，我希望把已知的工程风险记录到统一文档中，以便后续治理工作有明确依据。
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/architecture/TECH_DEBT.md
Record at least these issues: src/App.tsx is too heavy, polling is overused, event boundaries are loose, state truth may be duplicated, and manual verification is expensive
Each debt item includes the observed problem, current impact, recommended direction, and whether it blocks future work
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 建立测试策略文档
userStories.description: 作为开发者，我希望明确自动检查和人工验收的边界，以便每次改动后有稳定的验证路径。
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/process/TEST_STRATEGY.md
The document distinguishes automated checks, manual acceptance checks, and intentionally uncovered areas
The document explicitly states that multi-window behavior, transparency, click-through, tray behavior, and window positioning require manual verification
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 建立最小回归清单
userStories.description: 作为开发者，我希望有一份最小回归清单，以便常规改动后可以按固定步骤做人工回归。
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/process/REGRESSION_CHECKLIST.md
The checklist covers main window display, sub-window opening, Todo basic operations, Scheduler refresh, Focus state changes, and speech bubble display
Each checklist item describes an observable verification action instead of a vague statement
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 统一 package.json 检查脚本入口
userStories.description: 作为开发者，我希望根目录提供统一检查脚本，以便不用靠记忆拼装最小验证命令。
acceptanceCriteria: Add or update package.json scripts for check:ts, check:rust, check, and verify
check:ts runs npx tsc --noEmit
check:rust runs cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
check aggregates the minimum automated validation path for the repository
The responsibility of verify is documented in the repository docs
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 重组 docs 目录并修复文档导航
userStories.description: 作为项目维护者，我希望按用途重组 docs 目录并修复导航入口，以便任何人都能快速找到需求、架构、流程和日志。
acceptanceCriteria: Reorganize docs into clear sections such as specs, architecture, process, and logs, or document the equivalent target structure
Update document references so no navigation document points to a missing file after the reorganization
Update DEVELOPMENT_GUIDE.md to serve as the new documentation navigation entry point
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 固化后续代码治理规则
userStories.description: 作为开发者，我希望把后续协作规则固化进入口文档，以便项目不会很快回到结构混乱状态。
acceptanceCriteria: Document that new features require a spec card before implementation begins
Document that cross-module changes must update the related docs in the same change
Document that new business logic should go to services or appropriate modules instead of defaulting to src/App.tsx
Document that contributors must run the minimum checks and inspect git diff before submitting changes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 验证结构清理闭环是否成立
userStories.description: 作为项目维护者，我希望最后做一次文档与流程的闭环检查，以便确认结构清理产物已经形成可用的工程入口。
acceptanceCriteria: All newly created docs are reachable from the documentation entry points without dead links
FEATURE_MATRIX, ROADMAP, architecture docs, process docs, and PROJECT_STATUS reference each other consistently where needed
The documented minimum check path can be followed from DEVELOPMENT_GUIDE.md without guessing missing steps
git diff contains only the expected structure-cleanup and documentation changes for this initiative
Typecheck passes
